title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 378.632 - Injunction, who may file
text:
378.632.  Injunction, who may file. — No application or petition for injunction against any domestic, foreign or alien society, or lodge thereof, shall be recognized in any court of this state unless made by the director.
(L. 1992 S.B. 831) 
Effective 1-01-93
